title: FTS n-character prefix query returns incorrect results when using an n+1 character prefix index.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE fts_table (content String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY content;
SELECT * FROM fts_table WHERE content LIKE 'app%';
SELECT * FROM fts_table WHERE content LIKE 'appl%';
SELECT count() FROM fts_table WHERE content LIKE 'app%';
key_bug_features: n-character prefix query with n+1 character index
